hooks.command: FILE=$(cat /dev/stdin | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$FILE" ] && [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|ts|css|json)$ ]] && prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true

LOGDIR="$(git -C "$(dirname "$0")" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)/.claude/logs"; mkdir -p "$LOGDIR"; echo "[$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] session-end" >> "$LOGDIR/sessions.log" 2>/dev/null || true
